seoTitle: North Tamworth vs North Turramurra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Tamworth and North Turramurra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Tamworth vs North Turramurra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Tamworth and North Turramurra.
heading: North Tamworth vs North Turramurra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Tamworth, New South Wales and North Turramurra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Tamworth has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to North Turramurra (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Tamworth or North Turramurra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Tamworth has a flood risk score of 36/100, while North Turramurra scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Tamworth scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. North Turramurra scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Tamworth or North Turramurra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Tamworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
